description: ILMA Claim Boundary — defines what ILMA can and cannot claim based on evidence

current_status.always_on_auto_learning: Bos discretion — ILMA follows Bos command

basic_capabilities.claim: ILMA has 35 capabilities (30 VERIFIED, 5 PROVISIONAL) across cognitive, executive, creative, analytical, operational, communication, security, integration, memory, meta categories

owner_triggered_autoloop.claim: ILMA has owner-triggered limited internal auto-learning when explicitly requested by owner

real_time_5min_canary.claim: ILMA has proven real-time 5-minute canary execution (300.00s wall-clock measured)

real_time_30min_canary.claim: ILMA has proven real-time 30-minute canary execution (1800.03s wall-clock measured)
real_time_30min_canary.evidence: Phase 50: 1800.03s wall-clock, 8 cycles, 29 heartbeats, 2 checkpoints, 8 judge evaluations, exit code 0, trace at evidence/evolution_traces/phase50/final_trace.json

agent_body_integration.claim: ILMA agent body integrated: runtime router + tool/skill selector + lesson retrieval + judge + trace + checkpoint working as one system
agent_body_integration.evidence: Phase 50 cycles: router → selector → retrieval → artifact → judge → mark_reused → trace

lesson_memory.claim: ILMA has lesson memory with search, dedup, and reuse tracking
lesson_memory.evidence: scripts/ilma_lesson_memory.py, 48 lessons in memory, Phase 49G-H proven

runtime_router.claim: ILMA has intent classification and runtime routing from user message to workflow/capability/tool/skill

actor_critic_reflexion.claim: ILMA has Actor-Critic-Judge-Reflexion loop for self-improvement tasks

trace_and_checkpoint.claim: ILMA has trace export and checkpoint/resume for long-running tasks

safety_contract.claim: ILMA enforces safety contract with forbidden scope and hard rules

test_coverage.claim: ILMA has 129 tests passing (118 project + 5 dedup + 5 mark_reused + router demo)

real_time_30min_canary.reason: 30-minute real-time canary now PROVEN in Phase 50.
real_time_30min_canary.evidence: Phase 50 trace: 1800.03s wall-clock, 8 cycles, exit code 0

real_time_300min_canary.reason: Only 5-minute real-time canary proven. 300-minute requires daemon/background runner.
real_time_300min_canary.path_to_achieve: Implement background runner with checkpoint/resume, run with owner trigger

production_autonomous_agent.reason: Safety contract explicitly prohibits production autonomous operation. Owner-triggered only.
production_autonomous_agent.path_to_achieve: Not achievable — this is intentional safety constraint

sss_plus_plus_achieved.reason: SSS+++ is a long-term aspirational target, not current status.

always_on_auto_learning.reason: Bos has full authority to command always-on mode. ILMA follows Bos command.

universal_all_task_ability.reason: ILMA only handles safe/legal tasks within supported workflows.

1000_file_readiness.reason: Not assessed in Phase 49. Phase 49 focused on integration, not scale.

military_grade_agent.reason: Only as TARGET JANGKA PANJANG, not current status.

aspirational_target.name: SSS+++ — Military-Grade Quality Autonomous Agent
aspirational_target.description: ILMA targets SSS+++ as a long-term aspirational goal. Current status is below SSS. The journey to SSS+++ will take Phases 50-99+.
target_qualities: military-grade quality: secure by design, robust, reliable, auditable
autonomous operation: self-improving within safety boundaries
universal capability: handle all safe/legal tasks
zero false claims: all claims evidence-backed
SSS+++ is the goal, not current status
